SELECT ds.name, ds.type FROM (SELECT aref(sql_data_sources(), 0) AS name, aref(sql_data_sources(), 1) AS type) ds;
SELECT ds.name FROM (SELECT aref(sql_data_sources(), ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY aref(sql_data_sources(), 0))) AS name) ds WHERE ds.name IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT aref(sql_data_sources(), 0) AS name FROM DUAL);
SELECT (SELECT aref(sql_data_sources(), 0) FROM DUAL) AS PrimarySource, (SELECT aref(sql_data_sources(), 1) FROM DUAL) AS SourceType;
SELECT a.DataSourceName, b.SourceType FROM (SELECT aref(sql_data_sources(), 0) AS DataSourceName) a JOIN (SELECT aref(sql_data_sources(), 1) AS SourceType) b ON a.DataSourceName = b.SourceType;
SELECT aref(sql_data_sources(), 0) AS DataSourceName FROM (SELECT ds.* FROM sql_data_sources() ds WHERE ds.type = 'Remote') AS remote_sources;
